title: Hundreds, tens, and ones
description: Practice thinking about place value of 3-digit numbers as hundreds, tens, and ones.

assessment_items.question_content:
**What number represents the same amount as $7$ hundreds $~+~0$ tens $+~100$ ones?**

[[☃ input-number 1]]
hints: Let's use place value blocks to help us solve!

The number has $\purpleD7$ hundreds, $0$ tens, and $\maroonD{100}$ ones.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/722b486b763ad1b9e2739ac0795a27926dc8bc4d)

$\maroonD{100}\text{ ones} = \purpleD1\text{ hundred}$ so we can move the $\maroonD{100}\text{ ones}$ to the hundreds column.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/8efd973a1dc858cf56e368c6fc66339fade5fa58)

Now, there are a total of $8$ hundreds.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/5c166746df3a3f0c4d0000a46d539d48812991b3)


$8$ hundreds = $800$
$7\text{ hundreds} + 0\text{ tens}+ 100\text{ ones}= 800$

assessment_items.question_content:
**What number represents the same amount as $8$ hundreds $~+~10$ tens $+~0$ ones?**

[[☃ input-number 1]]
hints: Let's use place value blocks to help us solve!

The number has $\purpleD8$ hundreds, $\blueE{10}$ tens, and $\maroonD{0}$ ones.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/6f6d1faf9b59a3e6df44ca468512eb6b61fd2eb5)

$\blueE{10}\text{ tens} = \purpleD1\text{ hundred}$ so we can move the $\blueE{10}\text{ tens}$ to the hundreds column.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/541f81e80990e9bc5ea9294206cd0d58b1743252)

Now, there are a total of $9$ hundreds.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/296566a79eb271d30b556b924dc890b4b5035c77)

$9$ hundreds = $900$
$8\text{ hundreds} + 10\text{ tens}+ 0\text{ ones}= 900$

assessment_items.question_content:
**What number represents the same amount as $1$ hundred $+~5$ tens $+~12$ ones?**

[[☃ input-number 1]]
hints: Let's use place value blocks to help us solve!

The number has $\purpleD1$ hundred, $\blueE{5}$ tens, and $\maroonD{12}$ ones.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/a3c610f605acbb3cc9958c51f59f6031fb6fcffc)

$\maroonD{10}\text{ ones} = \blueE1\text{ ten}$ so we can move the $\maroonD{10}\text{ ones}$ to the tens column.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/4e4422127674a9df715ef4e47404eebb05147b43)

Now, there is a total of $1$ hundreds, $6$ tens, and $2$ ones.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/8e8bbb6d4366e58bbdc96dbff82396725abe5cb1)

$1$ hundreds, $6$ tens, and $2$ ones = $162$
$1\text{ hundred} + 5\text{ tens}+ 12\text{ ones}= 162$

assessment_items.question_content:
**What number represents the same amount as $3$ hundreds $+~4$ tens $+16$ ones?**

[[☃ input-number 1]]
hints: Let's use place value blocks to help us solve!

The number has $\purpleD3$ hundreds, $\blueE{4}$ tens, and $\maroonD{16}$ ones.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/4cec0d3da3d05d598b1473c9da7eebea228710d3)

$\maroonD{10}\text{ ones} = \blueE1\text{ ten}$ so we can move the $\maroonD{10}\text{ ones}$ to the tens column.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/f320771bd92537510a7b8309607e5479e6c29f6a)

Now, there is a total of $3$ hundreds, $5$ tens, and $6$ ones.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/8316054ea31d8cfab235974f353baf879836957e)

$3$ hundreds, $5$ tens, and $6$ ones = $356$
$3\text{ hundreds} + 4\text{ tens}+ 16\text{ ones}= 356$

assessment_items.question_content:
**What number represents the same amount as $2$ hundreds $+$ $14$ tens $+$ $3$ ones?**

[[☃ input-number 1]]
hints: Let's use place value blocks to help us solve!

The number has $\purpleD2$ hundreds, $\blueE{14}$ tens, and $\maroonD{3}$ ones.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/caea56ad7dc4b4a2c0115540aacf7fc366a6cfbe)

$\blueE{10}\text{ tens} = \purpleD1\text{ hundred}$ so we can move the $\blueE{10}\text{ tens}$ to the hundreds column.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/5aac334e96f7921937fd61a408bb94d23780434e)

Now, there is a total of $3$ hundreds, $4$ tens, and $3$ ones.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/7ceca82154545bab77ff973127135be039b0d4a4)

$3$ hundreds, $4$ tens, and $3$ ones = $343$
$2\text{ hundreds} + 14\text{ tens}+ 3\text{ ones}= 343$

assessment_items.question_content:
**What number represents the same amount as $6$ hundreds $+~6$ tens $+14$ ones?**

$\maroonD{10}\text{ ones} = \blueE1\text{ ten}$ so we can move the $\maroonD{10}\text{ ones}$ to the tens column.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/cc389dbe7f6e365368308ac4034fd3b71e5e5518)

Now, there is a total of $6$ hundreds, $7$ tens, and $4$ ones.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/ae3d98b19aecf972a9a497a4e65a3aebd3e8271b)

$6$ hundreds, $7$ tens, and $4$ ones = $674$
$6\text{ hundreds} + 6\text{ tens}+ 14\text{ ones}= 674$

assessment_items.question_content:
**What number represents the same amount as $2$ hundreds $+~12$ tens $+~6$ ones?**

[[☃ input-number 1]]
hints: Let's use place value blocks to help us solve!

The number has $\purpleD2$ hundreds, $\blueE{12}$ tens, and $\maroonD{6}$ ones.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b8af5294b9cb1b9b3c4fb00dcd73e534b28f3a85)

$\blueE{10}\text{ tens} = \purpleD1\text{ hundred}$ so we can move the $\blueE{10}\text{ tens}$ to the hundreds column.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/1ff61527044755315c9edc3ee6cd4db7ad2711ed)

Now, there is a total of $3$ hundreds, $2$ tens, and $6$ ones.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/6301cb4729b482f379768b83ed7f61d67f5cb919)

$3$ hundreds, $2$ tens, and $6$ ones = $326$
$3\text{ hundreds} +2\text{ tens}+ 6\text{ ones}=326$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Complete the equations.**

 |  | |  | | | | |
-: | -: | :-: | -: | -: | -: | :-: | -: | -: | -: 
$300 =$|$3$ |$\text{ hundreds}$ |$+$| $0$ | $\text{ tens}$ | $+$ | $0$ |$\text{ ones}$
$300=$ | $0$| $\text{ hundreds}$ |$+$ | [[☃ numeric-input 6]] | $\text{tens}$ |$+$ | $0$ | $\text{ ones}$
$300=$ | $0$| $\text{ hundreds}$ |$+$ | $0$| $\text{ tens}$ |$+$ | [[☃ numeric-input 4]] | $\text{ones}$
hints:
Let's use place value blocks to help us solve!

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/50fa0423bad14b1aba402370474310fe9a62eb56)

$300=\purpleD{3}\text{ hundreds} + \blueE{0}\text{ tens} + \maroonD{0}\text{ ones}$

If we break apart one hundred into tens, we will see that $1\text{ hundred}= 10\text{ tens}$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/8c372c3bcf29ff756e7c045ec7186ec8af75d650)

So, $\purpleD3\text{ hundreds} = \blueE{30}\text{ tens}$

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/9817d99fd2524e68b4cdfbcf9b4144e1f8c51647)

If we break apart one ten into ones, we will see that $1\text{ ten}= 10\text{ ones}$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/e4fdf448967cc3f80b9adac27e4758efcc081e2c)

So, $\blueE{30}\text{ tens} = \maroonD{300}\text{ ones}$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/ab1a0f6e017ccd70af900f93b2922d1953ca40d4)

assessment_items.question_content:
**Complete the equations.**

 |  | |  | | | | |
-: | -: | :-: | -: | -: | -: | :-: | -: | -: | -: 
$600 =$|$6$ |$\text{ hundreds}$ |$+$| $0$ | $\text{ tens}$ | $+$ | $0$ |$\text{ ones}$
$600=$ | $0$| $\text{ hundreds}$ |$+$ | [[☃ numeric-input 1]] | $\text{tens}$ |$+$ | $0$ | $\text{ ones}$
$600=$ | $0$| $\text{ hundreds}$ |$+$ | $0$| $\text{ tens}$ |$+$ | [[☃ numeric-input 2]] | $\text{ones}$
hints:
Let's use place value blocks to help us solve!

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/cac96b5246760668c5747729bf00624cea5ab541)

$600=\purpleD{6}\text{ hundreds} + \blueE{0}\text{ tens} + \maroonD{0}\text{ ones}$

If we break apart one hundred into tens, we will see that $1\text{ hundred}= 10\text{ tens}$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/8c372c3bcf29ff756e7c045ec7186ec8af75d650)

So, $\purpleD6\text{ hundreds} = \blueE{60}\text{ tens}$

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/8c1eb7481671cdfcaa2308530499ba960adb84eb)

If we break apart one ten into ones, we will see that $1\text{ ten}= 10\text{ ones}$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/e4fdf448967cc3f80b9adac27e4758efcc081e2c)

So, $\blueE{60}\text{ tens} = \maroonD{600}\text{ ones}$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/4c2c5c6a02e0a313ba4489bf24d2438f27716e4a)

assessment_items.question_content:
**Complete the equations.**

 |  | |  | | | | |
-: | -: | :-: | -: | -: | -: | :-: | -: | -: | -: 
$247 =$|$2$ |$\text{ hundreds}$ |$+$| $4$ | $\text{ tens}$ | $+$ | $7$ |$\text{ ones}$
$247=$ | $0$| $\text{ hundreds}$ |$+$ | [[☃ numeric-input 1]] | $\text{tens}$ |$+$ | $7$ | $\text{ ones}$
$247=$ | $0$| $\text{ hundreds}$ |$+$ | $0$| $\text{ tens}$ |$+$ | [[☃ numeric-input 2]] | $\text{ones}$
hints:
Let's use place value blocks to help us solve!

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/1e9ce44fa21dd9dea4dc5ab8d7df2c44da8af35f)

$247=\purpleD{2}\text{ hundreds} + \blueE{4}\text{ tens} + \maroonD{7}\text{ ones}$

If we break apart one hundred into tens, we will see that $1\text{ hundred}= 10\text{ tens}$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/8c372c3bcf29ff756e7c045ec7186ec8af75d650)

So, $\purpleD2\text{ hundreds} = \blueE{20}\text{ tens}$

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/17e5d296bd84eb744f6f3c25583467f73ae0eff0)

$\blueE{20}\text{ tens} + \blueE4\text{ tens} +\maroonD7\text{ ones}= \blueE{24}\text{ tens}+\maroonD7\text{ ones}$

If we break apart one ten into ones, we will see that $1\text{ ten}= 10\text{ ones}$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/e4fdf448967cc3f80b9adac27e4758efcc081e2c)

So, $\blueE{24}\text{ tens} = \maroonD{240}\text{ ones}$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/f53934eafb21c76b6ff14da667aeaac22a6fe69c)

$\maroonD{240}\text{ ones} + \maroonD7\text{ ones} = \maroonD{247}\text{ ones}$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Complete the equations.**

 |  | |  | | | | |
-: | -: | :-: | -: | -: | -: | :-: | -: | -: | -: 
$538 =$|$5$ |$\text{ hundreds}$ |$+$| $3$ | $\text{ tens}$ | $+$ | $8$ |$\text{ ones}$
$538=$ | $0$| $\text{ hundreds}$ |$+$ | [[☃ numeric-input 1]] | $\text{tens}$ |$+$ | $8$ | $\text{ ones}$
$538=$ | $0$| $\text{ hundreds}$ |$+$ | $0$| $\text{ tens}$ |$+$ | [[☃ numeric-input 2]] | $\text{ones}$
hints:
Let's use place value blocks to help us solve!

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/1fe529ca6d205cd7efb92e40135304e0047224d5)

$538=\purpleD{5}\text{ hundreds} + \blueE{3}\text{ tens} + \maroonD{8}\text{ ones}$

If we break apart one hundred into tens, we will see that $1\text{ hundred}= 10\text{ tens}$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/8c372c3bcf29ff756e7c045ec7186ec8af75d650)

So, $\purpleD5\text{ hundreds} = \blueE{50}\text{ tens}$

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/93722a740d72435d6ec129098ed8c30bc500730b)

$\blueE{50}\text{ tens} + \blueE3\text{ tens} +\maroonD7\text{ ones}= \blueE{53}\text{ tens}+\maroonD7\text{ ones}$

If we break apart one ten into ones, we will see that $1\text{ ten}= 10\text{ ones}$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/e4fdf448967cc3f80b9adac27e4758efcc081e2c)

So, $\blueE{53}\text{ tens} = \maroonD{530}\text{ ones}$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/de00629b090100fb2378117b6d8736b4f52c4e97)

$\maroonD{530}\text{ ones} + \maroonD8\text{ ones} = \maroonD{538}\text{ ones}$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Complete the equations.**

 |  | |  | | | | |
-: | -: | :-: | -: | -: | -: | :-: | -: | -: | -: 
$192 =$|$1$ |$\text{ hundred}$ |$+$| $9$ | $\text{ tens}$ | $+$ | $2$ |$\text{ ones}$
$192=$ | $0$| $\text{ hundreds}$ |$+$ | [[☃ numeric-input 1]] | $\text{tens}$ |$+$ | $2$ | $\text{ ones}$
$192=$ | $0$| $\text{ hundreds}$ |$+$ | $0$| $\text{ tens}$ |$+$ | [[☃ numeric-input 2]] | $\text{ones}$
hints:
Let's use place value blocks to help us solve!

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/15149e4e85dfaf85d7d4ff14394ba51e7f486735)

$192=\purpleD{1}\text{ hundred} + \blueE{9}\text{ tens} + \maroonD{2}\text{ ones}$

If we break apart one hundred into tens, we will see that $1\text{ hundred}= 10\text{ tens}$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/8c372c3bcf29ff756e7c045ec7186ec8af75d650)

So, $\purpleD1\text{ hundred} = \blueE{10}\text{ tens}$

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/5b5ad9f3dbe81f5f68fd01afdfb965713aa3754b)

$\blueE{10}\text{ tens} + \blueE9\text{ tens} +\maroonD2\text{ ones}= \blueE{19}\text{ tens}+\maroonD2\text{ ones}$

If we break apart one ten into ones, we will see that $1\text{ ten}= 10\text{ ones}$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/e4fdf448967cc3f80b9adac27e4758efcc081e2c)

So, $\blueE{19}\text{ tens} = \maroonD{190}\text{ ones}$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/e92e8f0bfc1f2cff0927e0e597908be105f94c61)

$\maroonD{190}\text{ ones} + \maroonD2\text{ ones} = \maroonD{192}\text{ ones}$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Complete the equations.**

 |  | |  | | | | |
-: | -: | :-: | -: | -: | -: | :-: | -: | -: | -: 
$489 =$|$4$ |$\text{ hundreds}$ |$+$| $8$ | $\text{ tens}$ | $+$ | $9$ |$\text{ ones}$
$489=$ | $0$| $\text{ hundreds}$ |$+$ | [[☃ numeric-input 1]] | $\text{tens}$ |$+$ | $9$ | $\text{ ones}$
$489=$ | $0$| $\text{ hundreds}$ |$+$ | $0$| $\text{ tens}$ |$+$ | [[☃ numeric-input 2]] | $\text{ones}$
hints:
Let's use place value blocks to help us solve!

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/a5a52760ee6ddf0902bcb447046ea7eda56739f3)

$489=\purpleD{4}\text{ hundreds} + \blueE{8}\text{ tens} + \maroonD{9}\text{ ones}$

If we break apart one hundred into tens, we will see that $1\text{ hundred}= 10\text{ tens}$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/8c372c3bcf29ff756e7c045ec7186ec8af75d650)

So, $\purpleD1\text{ hundred} = \blueE{10}\text{ tens}$

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/17aac70ba720738c5ee62d4b4e06ff3e284ffc28)

$\blueE{40}\text{ tens} + \blueE8\text{ tens} +\maroonD9\text{ ones}= \blueE{48}\text{ tens}+\maroonD9\text{ ones}$

If we break apart one ten into ones, we will see that $1\text{ ten}= 10\text{ ones}$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/e4fdf448967cc3f80b9adac27e4758efcc081e2c)

So, $\blueE{48}\text{ tens} = \maroonD{480}\text{ ones}$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/be223fd95945f0d09828031c93a4e0ff43bf25a8)

$\maroonD{480}\text{ ones} + \maroonD9\text{ ones} = \maroonD{489}\text{ ones}$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Complete the equations.**

 |  | |  | | | | |
-: | -: | :-: | -: | -: | -: | :-: | -: | -: | -: 
$354 =$|$3$ |$\text{ hundreds}$ |$+$| $5$ | $\text{ tens}$ | $+$ | $4$ |$\text{ ones}$
$354=$ | $0$| $\text{ hundreds}$ |$+$ | [[☃ numeric-input 1]] | $\text{tens}$ |$+$ | $4$ | $\text{ ones}$
$354=$ | $0$| $\text{ hundreds}$ |$+$ | $0$| $\text{ tens}$ |$+$ | [[☃ numeric-input 2]] | $\text{ones}$
hints:
Let's use place value blocks to help us solve!

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/a38fce76f4bf7b902c5c4e0202089095fea34ebe)

$354=\purpleD{3}\text{ hundreds} + \blueE{5}\text{ tens} + \maroonD{4}\text{ ones}$

If we break apart one hundred into tens, we will see that $1\text{ hundred}= 10\text{ tens}$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/8c372c3bcf29ff756e7c045ec7186ec8af75d650)

So, $\purpleD1\text{ hundred} = \blueE{10}\text{ tens}$

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/7274bdecc82e2f72fead766d172fcb5a6e37baef)

$\blueE{30}\text{ tens} + \blueE5\text{ tens} +\maroonD4\text{ ones}= \blueE{35}\text{ tens}+\maroonD4\text{ ones}$

If we break apart one ten into ones, we will see that $1\text{ ten}= 10\text{ ones}$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/e4fdf448967cc3f80b9adac27e4758efcc081e2c)

So, $\blueE{35}\text{ tens} = \maroonD{350}\text{ ones}$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/98fe41af78868b7d8084868a131b096cdc6249a3)

$\maroonD{350}\text{ ones} + \maroonD4\text{ ones} = \maroonD{354}\text{ ones}$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which expressions represent the same amount as $400$?**


[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
Let's use place value blocks to build each number and see which ones equal $\purpleD{400}$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/3bb23cd88457d199717ea71fe968b0960609b68a)

$\purpleD{100} + \maroonD4$

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/58ba3cc0cfd0c190eb68b9bbb2fa5dfcbcd03567)

$\purpleD{100} + \maroonD4 = 104$

$\purpleD{100} + \maroonD4\neq400$

$\blueE{10}+ \blueE{10} + \blueE{10} + \blueE{10}$

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/80135cb0342d6e2b5f1ebc12c0d195e6534c0259)

$\blueE{10}+ \blueE{10} + \blueE{10} + \blueE{10} = 
{40}$

$\blueE{10}+ \blueE{10} + \blueE{10} + \blueE{10} \neq{400}$

$\purpleD{100} + \purpleD{100} + \purpleD{100} + \purpleD{100}$

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/3bb23cd88457d199717ea71fe968b0960609b68a)

$\purpleD{100} + \purpleD{100} + \purpleD{100} + \purpleD{100} = {400}$

$\purpleD{100} + \purpleD{100} + \purpleD{100} + \purpleD{100}= {400}$

$\purpleD{300} + \purpleD{100}$

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/06b8f16167f691848fefd3c0f4c9f1d6840c2e2b)

$\purpleD{300} + \purpleD{100} = 400$

$\purpleD{300} + \purpleD{100} = 400$

These expressions are equivalent to $400$:

* $100 + 100 + 100 + 100$
* $300 + 100$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which expressions represent the same amount as $823$?**



[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
Let's use place value blocks to build each number and see which ones equal $\purpleD{8}\blueE2\maroonD3$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/6ab2e9f5e9f331c8431f3c2835840c06bdd08193)

$\purpleD{800} + \maroonD2 + \maroonD3$

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/e4409041b9198771f645a593e7d386477982e0bf)

$\purpleD{800} + \maroonD2 + \maroonD3=\purpleD{800} + \maroonD5 = 805$

$\purpleD{800} + \maroonD2 + \maroonD3\neq823$

$\maroonD{8}+ \maroonD{2} + \maroonD{3}$

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/34886f9bf5b2978e9667d35c2d9078fefa189cd6)

$\maroonD{8}+ \maroonD{2} + \maroonD{3}= {13}$

$\maroonD{8}+ \maroonD{2} + \maroonD{3} \neq{823}$

$\purpleD{800} + \blueE{20} + \maroonD{3}$

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/6ab2e9f5e9f331c8431f3c2835840c06bdd08193)

$\purpleD{800} + \blueE{20} + \maroonD{3}= {823}$

$\purpleD{800} + \blueE{10}+ \blueE{10} + \maroonD3$

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/33f87a01d83776b64f941b410b5104ba6b47c52a)

$\purpleD{800} + \blueE{10}+ \blueE{10} + \maroonD3 = \purpleD{800} + \blueE{20} + \maroonD3= {823}$

$\purpleD{800} + \blueE{10}+ \blueE{10} + \maroonD3 = 823$

These expressions are equivalent to $823$:

* $800 + 20 + 3$
* $800 + 10 + 10 + 3$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which expressions represent the same amount as $519$?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
Let's use place value blocks to build each number and see which ones equal $\purpleD{5}\blueE1\maroonD9$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/75881f200a907e0cd803da28cabde02c589732e3)

$\purpleD{500} + \blueE{10} + \blueE{90}$

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/67e21182840ace596d31ad6e0f18990cbf8106e5)

$\purpleD{500} + \blueE{10} + \blueE{90}= \purpleD{500} + \blueE{100} = 600$

$\purpleD{500} + \blueE{10} + \blueE{90}\neq519$

$\blueE{50} + \blueE{10} + \maroonD{9}$

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/7017d8999b6bc745db001d5752a37457bb1b4273)

$\blueE{50} + \blueE{10}+ \maroonD{9}= \blueE{60} + \maroonD9 = 69$

$\blueE{50} + \blueE{10} + \maroonD{9}\neq69$

$\purpleD{400} + \purpleD{100} + \blueE{10} + \maroonD{9}$

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/019839cc6f724081ba22b8084817e480a8adad36)

$\purpleD{400} +\purpleD{100} + \blueE{10} + \maroonD{9} = \purpleD{500} + \blueE{10} + \maroonD9= {519}$

$\purpleD{400} + \purpleD{100} + \blueE{10} + \maroonD{9}= {519}$

$\purpleD{500} + \blueE{10}+ \maroonD{5} + \maroonD4$

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b8ad3ee98c66d435f79db037895efc9678e0860a)

$\purpleD{500} + \blueE{10}+ \maroonD5+ \maroonD4 = \purpleD{500} + \blueE{10} + \maroonD9= {519}$

$\purpleD{500} + \blueE{10}+ \maroonD{5} + \maroonD4 = 519$

These expressions are equivalent to $519$:

* $400 + 100 + 10 + 9$
* $500 + 10 + 5 + 4$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which expressions represent the same amount as $342$?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
Let's use place value blocks to build each number and see which ones equal $\purpleD{3}\blueE4\maroonD2$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/daedfd136818d11160af995c4e03b9252973164e)

$\purpleD3$ hundreds $+~\blueE{42}$ tens

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/be6a3f8ec5b6c63f2d9021aa87b3d5d15d3f817c)

$\purpleD{300} + \blueE{420} = 720$

$\purpleD3$ hundreds $+~\blueE{42}$ tens $\neq342$

$\purpleD3$ hundreds $+~\maroonD4$ ones$+~\maroonD2$ ones

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/3204872216b569c8bf9736cfe02ccd4137dc298b)

$\purpleD{300} + \maroonD{4} + \maroonD2  = \purpleD{300} + \maroonD{6}  = 306$

$\purpleD3$ hundreds $+~\maroonD4$ ones$+~\maroonD2$ ones$\neq342$

$\purpleD2$ hundreds $+~\blueE{14}$ tens $+~\maroonD2$ ones

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/e45183ee10f92876d49840d1c0370320891a7a8c)

$\purpleD{200} + \blueE{140} + \maroonD2 = 342$

$\purpleD2$ hundreds $+~\blueE{14}$ tens $+~\maroonD2$ ones$=342$

$\purpleD3$ hundreds $+~\maroonD{42}$ ones

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/e32eedd35c22dea0abbe367a4354db399f98e5c6)

$\purpleD{300} + \maroonD{42} = 342$

$\purpleD3$ hundreds $+~\maroonD{42}$ ones $=342$

These expressions are equivalent to $342$:

* $3$ hundreds $+~42$ tens
* $2$ hundreds $+14$ tens $+2$ ones

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which expressions represent the same amount as $271$?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
Let's use place value blocks to build each number and see which ones equal $\purpleD{2}\blueE7\maroonD1$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/3e874c0187191d15a497808e8d260a6169e47d09)

$\blueE{22}$ tens $+~\blueE7$ tens $+\maroonD1$ one

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/19ed506ad9a3ae388a6b2c0e2825ff7a6f4513bd)

$\blueE{220} + \blueE{70} + \maroonD1 = 291$

$\blueE{22}$ tens $+~\blueE7$ tens $+~\maroonD1$ one $\neq271$

$\purpleD1$ hundred $+~\blueE{12}$ tens$+~\maroonD1$ one

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/f48a45bddfec02cbcf1487c4e07de179f7033c32)

$\purpleD{100} + \blueE{120} + \maroonD1 = 221$

$\purpleD1$ hundred $+~\blueE{12}$ tens$+~\maroonD1$ one $\neq271$

$\purpleD2$ hundreds $+~\blueE7$ tens  $+~\maroonD1$ one

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/2540d4ef21d5ee11d4ae8444ddbac63ed3d88e66)

$\purpleD{200} + \blueE{70} + \maroonD1 = 271$

$\purpleD2$ hundreds $+~\blueE7$ tens $+~\maroonD1$ one $=271$

$\blueE{27}$ tens $+\maroonD1$ one

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/87ea38afcf7d5956ad24aa1574e423f22ae94629)

$\blueE{270} +  \maroonD1 = 271$

$\blueE{27}$ tens $+~\maroonD1$ one $=271$

These expressions are equivalent to $271$:

* $27$ tens $+1$ one
* $2$ hundreds $+~7$ tens $+~1$ one
